overall.description: First-person perspective walking along a futuristic coastal highway in a video game environment. The scene features a concrete promenade with green railings, palm trees, passing futuristic vehicles, and a distant cyberpunk city skyline across calm waters under a clear blue sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal highway promenade with pedestrian walkway

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the waterfront sidewalk with the highway to the right and city skyline ahead

entered.detail: green metal railings separating the sidewalk from the multi-lane highway
tall palm trees lining the sidewalk at regular intervals
futuristic high-rise buildings and skyscrapers in the distance
asphalt road with multiple lanes for vehicle traffic
tall modern street lamps along the highway

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view walking along a sunny coastal promenade. Green railings line the right side separating the concrete sidewalk from a multi-lane highway where sparse futuristic traffic passes by. Palm trees line the path and a distant cyberpunk city skyline rises ahead under a clear blue sky.

events.description: camera turns sharply left to face the ocean and observe the water and distant industrial structures

agents.ego_description: stopping forward progress to look out over the water at the distant cooling towers and bridge

entered.detail: tall concrete barrier separating the sidewalk from the water below
calm blue ocean water stretching to the horizon
row of large cylindrical industrial cooling towers visible across the water
large suspension bridge visible in the far distance
tall rectangular billboard with orange face and purple frame

segments.scene_description: The camera pivots left to overlook the ocean, revealing a concrete sea wall and calm waters stretching toward distant industrial cooling towers and a suspension bridge. The large orange billboard becomes visible on the right edge of the frame as the view temporarily abandons the highway scene.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal highway passing large billboard and solar installations

agents.ego_description: resuming forward movement along the sidewalk, approaching a pedestrian walking ahead in the same direction

notable_agents.action: walking ahead on the sidewalk in the same direction as the camera

entered.detail: large angled solar collector panels or satellite dishes mounted on the sea wall

segments.scene_description: The camera turns back to face forward and continues walking along the promenade, now passing the large orange billboard on the left. Solar panel structures line the sea wall side while the pedestrian ahead continues walking in the same direction. The highway remains active with sparse futuristic vehicle traffic and the city skyline dominates the forward view.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey along a sunny coastal promenade that shifts from a forward view of a futuristic city to a panoramic ocean vista before returning to the path. It begins by walking past green railings and palm trees, with sparse futuristic traffic flowing on a highway toward a distant cyberpunk skyline. As the camera pivots left, the view shifts away from the road to reveal a concrete sea wall and calm waters stretching toward industrial cooling towers and a suspension bridge, while a large orange billboard enters the right edge of the frame. The scene then turns back forward to continue along the promenade, passing the orange billboard on the left and solar panel structures lining the sea wall. Finally, the camera follows a pedestrian ahead as the highway remains active and the city skyline dominates the horizon under a clear blue sky.
